name: cabin-abandoned
summary: An empty cabin left to rot. Cold hearth, overturned furniture, evidence of hasty departure or violence.

primary_palette.note: cold hearth, ashes long settled — the story point
pallet half-collapsed in the corner — whoever slept here never came back
central upset — a struggle or a hurried departure

story_prompts: fled during a monster attack — door hangs open, claw marks on the lintel
plague-cleared — household belongings still in place, just no people
squatter camp layered over original residence — two eras of debris
murder site, investigator left everything exactly as found
anti_patterns: no lit fires, no working lanterns — this is a dead home
debris should look organic and asymmetric — don't grid-align fallen items
at least one prominent 'something is wrong' beat (blood, door ajar, object out of place)
